svg.text: CV Tajuk Revenue Cycle MVP - Class Diagram Version - Updated 12 July 2026
Columns use exact class names from the provided diagram. C = Create, R = Read, U = Update, D = Delete.
PreOrder is a specialization of SalesOrder and adds requiredDate plus PO document attributes.
Receivable is derived from Invoice remainingAmount, status, and dueDate; it is not a separate class.
Restricted deletion removes related SalesOrderItem, Invoice, Payment, FollowUp, DeliveryNote, and DeliveryNoteItem records.
AuditTrail exists in the app but is omitted here because it is not shown in the provided class diagram.
